chunks.originalText:
Mῆνιν ἄειδε θεὰ Πηληϊάδεω Ἀχιλῆος
οὐλομένην, ἣ μυρί᾽ Ἀχαιοῖς ἄλγε᾽ ἔθηκε,
chunks.translatedText: Sing, goddess, the wrath of Achilles, Peleus' son, and the ruin it brought down in wave after wave upon the Achaeans.

chunks.originalText: πολλὰς δ᾽ ἰφθίμους ψυχὰς Ἄϊδι προΐαψεν
chunks.translatedText: It drove so many valiant souls ahead to the house of Hades.
